name: Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the ingredients by chopping potatoes into halves and onion into quarters.
2. Place the chopped vegetables at the bottom of a pot or slow cooker.
3. Place the roast on top of the vegetables.
4. Season the meat with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Pour water over all the ingredients, ensuring they are fully covered.
6. Add the onion soup mix according to package instructions.
7. Simmer everything on low heat for several hours until the meat is tender and falls apart easily.
8. Optionally, add a small can of whole tomatoes for extra flavor if desired.
